calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Issue Regarding Surcharges
Off Calendar Sep-24-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Susan Kaye for Margaret Feodoroff.

The Court noted that Mr. Schreiner was not present. The Court granted the petition, (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico.

Petition For 1) Order Suspending Trustee'S Prowers And Appointting Interm Trustee;
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Susan Kaye for Margaret Feodoroff. Timothy O'Brien was also present.

Mark Schreiner was not present in Court. Ms. Kaye reported that Mr. Winslow was not representing Mark Schreiner. The Court will remove Mark Schreiner as Trustee and appoint Margaret Feodoroff as the Successor Trustee. Mr. Schreiner is ordered to file an accounting and turn over all records. The issue regarding surcharges was continued to September 24, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bonner.

Ex Parte Application For Suspension Of Trustee Powers; And Related Relief
Off Calendar Jul-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Apr-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
